top_signals.title: Iran to seek ‘insurance fees’ for passage through Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Vessels must hold Tehran-approved insurance policy to use vital waterway, says government agency
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ambani’s Jio Could Be India’s Biggest IPO
top_signals.summary: Jio Platforms is gearing up for what could become India’s biggest IPO ever. The telecom giant serves nearly 525 million subscribers and counts Meta, Alphabet and KKR among its backers. Now, Ambani’s digital crown jewel is preparing for its next chapter. (Source: Bloomberg)
